free_text: Neutron activation cross sections at 14.4 MeV for some
naturally occurring heavy elements in the region
T(d,n) source. Ti-T target.
Coaxial Ge(Li) detector.
If the cross section of one of the product activities
is known it is used as an internal monitor.
Data errors given are RMS propagated errors,
and errors in half-lives, conversion coefficients and
branching ratios taken from the literature.
